articles.title: The sell-off for AI stars worsens, while oil prices keep jumping
articles.description: The sell-off for AI winners deepened and yanked stock markets lower worldwide

articles.title: US Strikes Iran Despite Tehran Threatening Full-Scale War, Oil Prices Surge
articles.description: US strikes Iran for a seventh straight night despite Tehran's full-scale war threat as oil price jumped amid Strait of Hormuz blockade.

articles.title: US military says 2 troops are dead and 1 is missing after Iran attacks a base in Jordan
articles.description: The U.S. military is reporting the first U.S. troop deaths from direct Iranian fire since the war's early days. Two were killed and one is missing after an attack on a base in Jordan on Friday. Iran's supreme leader warns of "unforgettable lessons" if the U.S. continues its attacks, and Tehran says it has suspended its commitments to the interim deal signed with the U.S. The intensifying exchange of fire in recent days has hit infrastructure and affected civilians. The conflict over the Strait of Hormuz is again impacting global oil prices. There is no new word on mediation efforts.

articles.title: 13 claims we've investigated involving Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: As the Iran war disrupted global oil shipments, we examined claims involving gas prices, political threats and the use of nuclear weapons.

articles.title: Iran’s supreme leader in a new statement warns of ‘unforgettable lessons’ if US continues attacks
articles.description: Iran’s supreme leader is warning of "unforgettable lessons" if the U.S. continues its attacks on the Islamic Republic. This comes hours after Iran said it was suspending its commitments to the countries' interim deal. The conflict over the Strait of Hormuz has intensified, with both nations targeting infrastructure. U.S. strikes hit Iranian sites earlier Saturday, while Iran's attacks caused significant damage in Kuwait, including a water desalination plant. The Gulf Cooperation Council has accused Iran of war crimes. The strait remains effectively closed, impacting global oil prices and shipping.

articles.title: Escalation in the Gulf: Iran and U.S. Exchange Strikes Amidst Rising Tensions
articles.description: Iran has intensified attacks on Washington's Gulf allies, including Kuwait and Jordan, after a week of U.S. military strikes on Iranian targets. This escalation threatens a return to full-scale war, with repercussions including damaged infrastructure and rising oil prices. Strikes affected vital energy and military sites.

articles.title: Time Is Ticking For Oil Reserves
articles.description: Rising geopolitical tensions are driving crude oil prices higher, signaling potential shortages and market volatility ahead.

articles.title: Oil and Gas Employment Hits a 2026 Low Even as Production Sets Records
articles.description: U.S. oil and gas jobs hit a 2026 low even as production sets records, and the reasons have little to do with falling oil prices.

articles.title: Crude Check: Oil Back in Bullish Territory
articles.description: Crude oil prices show bullish momentum, with key resistance levels indicating potential rallies for Brent and MCX futures.

articles.title: Kerosene oil prices rises in Pakistan
articles.description: Oil and Gas Regulatory Authority (OGRA) raised the price of kerosene by Rs. 34.33 per liter, bringing the new price to Rs. 276.66 per liter.
